claims.statement: Burj Khalifa height is at least 4× larger than Challenger Deep depth.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Burj Khalifa height: 828 m. Challenger Deep depth: 10984 m.

claims.statement: Category 5 hurricane threshold is faster than Brisk walking.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h. Brisk walking: 5 km/h.

claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is shorter than Channel Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer UN member states than bits in a byte.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 193 states vs 8 bits.

claims.statement: First iPhone released happened after World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First iPhone released: 2007. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
